mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", hu.name AS "handoverUserName", ru.name AS "receiverUserName" FROM project_handover a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account hu ON hu.id = a.handover_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account ru ON ru.id = a.receiver_user_id
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.projectName}, '%') AND p.name LIKE '%' || #{params.projectName} || '%'
AND a.handover_type = #{params.handoverType} AND a.handover_time >= #{params.startDate} AND a.handover_time <= #{params.endDate}
ORDER BY a.handover_time DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", hu.name AS "handoverUserName", ru.name AS "receiverUserName" FROM project_handover a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account hu ON hu.id = a.handover_user_id LEFT JOIN sys_account ru ON ru.id = a.receiver_user_id WHERE a.id = #{id}
